text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days before the race, Tamamo Cross and I
visit Nakayama Racecourse to walk the track.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... So at the start, I'll be 'bout here, and
when I hit the curve, I'll do one of these... And on
the straights, I can just...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Now that I'm seein' it up close 'n
personal... This track's pretty decent. Even good
for a nice stroll.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ah... What a nice breeze...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks uncharacteristically relaxed. I've never
seen her this laid-back while checking out tracks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Seeing her this way, I come to a conclusion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Get ready, people—the forecast's callin' for some
White Lightning.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And here comes the senior champion! The winner
of both the Takarazuka Kinen and the autumn
Tenno Sho has arrived!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama... Her aura is something else...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Is that... the same Tamtam I know?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Woooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The intensity of her presence cuts through the
tension in the air. The venue almost seems to
shudder.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Was Tamamo Cross always so... big?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Nah, she's the same as she always was. But I gotta admit... she feels like a giant today.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oguri, Creek. Today's the day we fulfill the
promises we made.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We talked about it at the end of summer,
remember? We wanted to race together again, all
three of us.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I-I remember... So...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I won't be spoiling you today, Tamtam. In fact, I'll
be doing the opposite.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're not the Tamamo Cross I know... Tama,
you're...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...This is the real me, Oguri. I've just been pullin' my punches till now.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Guess you could say I didn't have anythin'
anchorin' me. I was like lightnin' without the storm
clouds, ya know? Just crashin' into the ground.
One 'n done.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's not the case anymore. I've got someone to
pull me back into the storm clouds, and White
Lightning's been fully charged. Heck, maybe even
overcharged.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's like my whole body's... cracklin' with energy. I
feel like I could explode any moment. And with
this body—this newfound feelin'...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna blow ya away, Oguri. I'm gonna leave
ya behind in the blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The famed racer, Tamamo Cross. She is White
Lightning—a storm the likes of which none have
seen before—and now she stands proud, at the
peak of her prowess.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: This is Tama—No... this is Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Do I even have what it takes to race against this Tamamo Cross? I'm... I'm...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy! And excited!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I want to win—I will win! I... I have to!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Heh, figured you'd say as much. That's what
makes you the "Beast." And that's why I respect
ya, Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking Tamamo Cross's stirring comments on
board, Oguri Cap's entire body begins trembling
with excitement.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now keep your eyes peeled for some
once-in-a-lifetime lightnin'. Today, at the Arima
Kinen, the grand finale...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna be the wind and the light!
